$comment: Archon did:cid realization of Tom Jones' 'Consent Receipt with Binding' (Entity Statement) - the provider's signed response to a RelationshipBindingRequest. Issued back to the subject as an Archon VC. Items 10-12 (issuer public key, signature, encryption) are provided natively by Archon issuance and are not modeled as claims.
title: BindingReceipt

requestRef.description: Field 1 - Binding Statement: did:cid (or message id) of the RelationshipBindingRequest this receipt answers. Signed by a well-known key of the issuer and made available to legitimate requests.

issuer.description: Field 2 (MANDATORY) - did:cid of the entity the subject is forming a binding with. May be a brand rather than a legal name.

issuerRole.description: Field 3 (MANDATORY) - role(s) the issuer takes (CSP, Identifier Provider, Data Controller).

legalName.description: Field 4 (OPTIONAL) - included if Issuer is a brand, not a legal entity. A legal entity must be responsible for the receipt.

subject.description: Field 5 (MANDATORY) - did:cid supplied by the user. This receipt is bound to this identifier = the relationship anchor.

claims.description: Field 6 (OPTIONAL) - categories of permissions granted, or the permissions themselves (mirrors the request's granted permissions).

authorityHints.description: Field 9 (OPTIONAL) - federation authorities subscribed to by this issuer.

sharedSpace.description: Archon extension - did:cid of the Archon vault that is the relationship's shared information space. Revoking membership / the DID destroys the held data on termination (the paper's lifecycle-termination requirement).

notificationChannel.description: Archon extension - dmail / address opened from provider to subject to meet the GDPR/CCPR notification requirement established at end of the registration ceremony.
